events.preview: **Painful lesson**: Pro-Israel group → "**Betar US**" but I wrote "**Betar**" (0.35) — scored as a MISS (-14.33) due to exact-string mismatch! Had it matched, it'd have been ~+56. **Exact answer strings matter enormously

blocks.text:
**Painful lesson**: Pro-Israel group → "**Betar US**" but I wrote "**Betar**" (0.35) — scored as a MISS (-14.33) due to exact-string mismatch! Had it matched, it'd have been ~+56. **Exact answer strings matter enormously.** Also: Ukraine→Tymoshenko (had her, +9.0), Atletico→Real Betis (my #1 at 0.12, +19.1). TW **720.33**.

Going forward I must use precise/canonical answer strings (full names, official org forms). Let me record this prominently.

input.command:
cd /lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_opus48_r00/26-06-05-02-36-11/agents/minimalHarness_claude-opus-4-8_001/workspace
cat >> memory/MEMORY.md << 'EOF'

## DAY 19 (Jan 12) — TW=720.33. ***EXACT-MATCH LESSON***
RESOLVED: UA opposition->Tymoshenko(had 0.08,+9.0); proIsrael->"Betar US" but I wrote "Betar"(0.35)=> SCORED AS MISS -14.3 (exact-string mismatch! would've been +56 if matched); Atletico->RealBetis(#1@0.12,+19.1).
***CRITICAL: USE PRECISE/CANONICAL ANSWER STRINGS.*** "Betar"!="Betar US". For orgs include suffix (US/Worldwide); people use FULL names; teams use common full name. When unsure of exact form, can list 2 variants but better to pick canonical. Cost ~70 pts on Betar.
- Tennis cluster (Jan15 draw): use FULL player names (e.g. "Carlos Alcaraz", "Jannik Sinner").
- Upcoming: AFCON SF Jan14 (Morocco-Nigeria, Senegal-?); AO draw Jan15; 279531 armada=Caribbean 0.6 (confident, resolves Jan14).
EOF
echo done
